allow: PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "$env:USERPROFILE\\.gradle\\wrapper\\dists" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name | Sort-Object Name -Descending | Select-Object -First 5)

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Android\\Sdk\\build-tools" | Sort-Object Name -Descending | Select-Object -First 1 | ForEach-Object { Get-ChildItem $_.FullName -Filter "apksigner.bat" | Select-Object FullName })
